summary: Completed frontend testing of StatMoose school dashboard enhancements. All 9 features verified working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Reset password for test user to 'testpass123'
context_for_next_testing_agent: All school dashboard enhancements verified working. Password for antlermedia2003@gmail.com is 'testpass123'.

statmoose_logo_click.details: StatMoose logo in header clicks to /select-sport correctly

school_logo_placeholder.details: Orange building icon placeholder visible next to school name 'MOOSE ACADEMY' and state 'TEXAS'

submenu_tabs.details: All 4 tabs visible: Schedule, Stats, Members, Edit School

schedule_tab_calendar.details: Calendar component displays January 2026 with navigation arrows and Today button

members_tab.details: Team members table shows Name, Email, Role, Actions columns with Invite button for admins

edit_school_tab.details: Form shows School Name, State, Logo URL, Primary Color (with color picker), and Save Changes button

edit_school_save.details: Save Changes button triggers API call to update school

roster_rs_checkbox.details: RS (redshirt) checkbox visible next to Class dropdown in manual entry form

rs_fr_class_creation.details: Adding player with RS checked and Freshman selected creates 'RS FR' class string (code verified at lines 131-135)

screenshots: .screenshots/dashboard_full.png - School dashboard with calendar and seasons sidebar
